item.title: You're Supposed to Trim Your Broom
item.description: Discover why trimming worn broom bristles can help restore cleaning performance and extend the life of your broom.

media:content.media:title: You're Supposed to Trim Your Broom
media:content.media:description: Discover why trimming worn broom bristles can help restore cleaning performance and extend the life of your broom.

item.title: Make Every Belt Fit You
item.description: Discover a simple adjustment that can help almost any belt fit more comfortably and securely.

media:content.media:description: Discover a simple adjustment that can help almost any belt fit more comfortably and securely.

item.title: This Kitchen Staple Has Another Use
item.description: A common household ingredient can help with an unexpected cleanup task. See how it works in this simple demonstration.

item.title: Try Juicing Lemons This Way
item.description: Learn why placing a lemon cut-side down in some juicers can help extract juice more efficiently with less effort.

item.title: Your Instant Pot Has a Handy Lid Holder
item.description: Discover a built-in Instant Pot feature that lets you rest the lid securely in the handle while cooking, helping keep your workspace tidy.

media:content.media:description: Discover a built-in Instant Pot feature that lets you rest the lid securely in the handle while cooking, helping keep your workspace tidy.

item.title: Your Phone Can Read Laundry Care Labels
item.description: Discover how your smartphone can help interpret laundry care symbols, making it easier to understand washing and drying instructions.

item.title: Do Plants Really "Scream"?
item.description: Explore the science behind sounds produced by plants under stress and what researchers have discovered about this fascinating phenomenon.
